   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Signal Daily Documentation
==========================

Welcome to the Signal Daily documentation. This Django application is a news platform
with role-based access control, article publishing, and newsletter management.

Features
--------

* Custom user model with Reader, Journalist, and Editor roles
* Article publishing with multi-image uploads
* Newsletter creation and management
* Subscription support for publishers and journalists
* REST API with token authentication
* Email notifications for approved articles

API Documentation
-----------------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:
   
   modules
